; --- globals ---
@.fmt.concat.sd = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"%s%d\00", align 1
@.fmt.concat.ss = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"%s%s\00", align 1
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [1 x i8] c"\00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"M\00", align 1
@.str.10 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"IX\00", align 1
@.str.11 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"V\00", align 1
@.str.12 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"IV\00", align 1
@.str.13 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"I\00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"CM\00", align 1
@.str.3 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"D\00", align 1
@.str.4 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"CD\00", align 1
@.str.5 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"C\00", align 1
@.str.6 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"XC\00", align 1
@.str.7 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"L\00", align 1
@.str.8 = private unnamed_addr constant [3 x i8] c"XL\00", align 1
@.str.9 = private unnamed_addr constant [2 x i8] c"X\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)
declare i32 @snprintf(ptr, i32, ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_toRoman
define ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_2 = alloca ptr
  %merge_4 = alloca i32
  store ptr @.str.0, ptr %merge_2
  store i32 %arg0, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t0 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1000
  %t2 = icmp sge i32 %t0, %t1
  br i1 %t2, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t3 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t4 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t4, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t3, ptr @.str.1)
  store ptr %t4, ptr %merge_2
  %t6 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t7 = add i32 0, 1000
  %t8 = sub i32 %t6, %t7
  store i32 %t8, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb1
bb3:
  br label %bb4
bb4:
  %t9 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t10 = add i32 0, 900
  %t11 = icmp sge i32 %t9, %t10
  br i1 %t11, label %bb5, label %bb6
bb5:
  %t12 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t13 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t13, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t12, ptr @.str.2)
  store ptr %t13, ptr %merge_2
  %t15 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t16 = add i32 0, 900
  %t17 = sub i32 %t15, %t16
  store i32 %t17, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb4
bb6:
  br label %bb7
bb7:
  %t18 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t19 = add i32 0, 500
  %t20 = icmp sge i32 %t18, %t19
  br i1 %t20, label %bb8, label %bb9
bb8:
  %t21 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t22 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t22, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t21, ptr @.str.3)
  store ptr %t22, ptr %merge_2
  %t24 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t25 = add i32 0, 500
  %t26 = sub i32 %t24, %t25
  store i32 %t26, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb7
bb9:
  br label %bb10
bb10:
  %t27 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t28 = add i32 0, 400
  %t29 = icmp sge i32 %t27, %t28
  br i1 %t29, label %bb11, label %bb12
bb11:
  %t30 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t31 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t31, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t30, ptr @.str.4)
  store ptr %t31, ptr %merge_2
  %t33 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t34 = add i32 0, 400
  %t35 = sub i32 %t33, %t34
  store i32 %t35, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb10
bb12:
  br label %bb13
bb13:
  %t36 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t37 = add i32 0, 100
  %t38 = icmp sge i32 %t36, %t37
  br i1 %t38, label %bb14, label %bb15
bb14:
  %t39 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t40 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t40, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t39, ptr @.str.5)
  store ptr %t40, ptr %merge_2
  %t42 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t43 = add i32 0, 100
  %t44 = sub i32 %t42, %t43
  store i32 %t44, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb13
bb15:
  br label %bb16
bb16:
  %t45 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t46 = add i32 0, 90
  %t47 = icmp sge i32 %t45, %t46
  br i1 %t47, label %bb17, label %bb18
bb17:
  %t48 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t49 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t49, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t48, ptr @.str.6)
  store ptr %t49, ptr %merge_2
  %t51 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t52 = add i32 0, 90
  %t53 = sub i32 %t51, %t52
  store i32 %t53, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb16
bb18:
  br label %bb19
bb19:
  %t54 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t55 = add i32 0, 50
  %t56 = icmp sge i32 %t54, %t55
  br i1 %t56, label %bb20, label %bb21
bb20:
  %t57 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t58 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t58, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t57, ptr @.str.7)
  store ptr %t58, ptr %merge_2
  %t60 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t61 = add i32 0, 50
  %t62 = sub i32 %t60, %t61
  store i32 %t62, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb19
bb21:
  br label %bb22
bb22:
  %t63 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t64 = add i32 0, 40
  %t65 = icmp sge i32 %t63, %t64
  br i1 %t65, label %bb23, label %bb24
bb23:
  %t66 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t67 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t67, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t66, ptr @.str.8)
  store ptr %t67, ptr %merge_2
  %t69 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t70 = add i32 0, 40
  %t71 = sub i32 %t69, %t70
  store i32 %t71, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb22
bb24:
  br label %bb25
bb25:
  %t72 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t73 = add i32 0, 10
  %t74 = icmp sge i32 %t72, %t73
  br i1 %t74, label %bb26, label %bb27
bb26:
  %t75 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t76 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t76, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t75, ptr @.str.9)
  store ptr %t76, ptr %merge_2
  %t78 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t79 = add i32 0, 10
  %t80 = sub i32 %t78, %t79
  store i32 %t80, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb25
bb27:
  br label %bb28
bb28:
  %t81 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t82 = add i32 0, 9
  %t83 = icmp sge i32 %t81, %t82
  br i1 %t83, label %bb29, label %bb30
bb29:
  %t84 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t85 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t85, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t84, ptr @.str.10)
  store ptr %t85, ptr %merge_2
  %t87 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t88 = add i32 0, 9
  %t89 = sub i32 %t87, %t88
  store i32 %t89, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb28
bb30:
  br label %bb31
bb31:
  %t90 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t91 = add i32 0, 5
  %t92 = icmp sge i32 %t90, %t91
  br i1 %t92, label %bb32, label %bb33
bb32:
  %t93 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t94 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t94, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t93, ptr @.str.11)
  store ptr %t94, ptr %merge_2
  %t96 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t97 = add i32 0, 5
  %t98 = sub i32 %t96, %t97
  store i32 %t98, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb31
bb33:
  br label %bb34
bb34:
  %t99 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t100 = add i32 0, 4
  %t101 = icmp sge i32 %t99, %t100
  br i1 %t101, label %bb35, label %bb36
bb35:
  %t102 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t103 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t103, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t102, ptr @.str.12)
  store ptr %t103, ptr %merge_2
  %t105 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t106 = add i32 0, 4
  %t107 = sub i32 %t105, %t106
  store i32 %t107, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb34
bb36:
  br label %bb37
bb37:
  %t108 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t109 = add i32 0, 1
  %t110 = icmp sge i32 %t108, %t109
  br i1 %t110, label %bb38, label %bb39
bb38:
  %t111 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  %t112 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t112, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t111, ptr @.str.13)
  store ptr %t112, ptr %merge_2
  %t114 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t115 = add i32 0, 1
  %t116 = sub i32 %t114, %t115
  store i32 %t116, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb37
bb39:
  %t117 = load ptr, ptr %merge_2
  ret ptr %t117
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  %t1 = call ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %t0)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 4
  %t4 = call ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %t3)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 9
  %t7 = call ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %t6)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t7)
  %t9 = add i32 0, 42
  %t10 = call ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %t9)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t10)
  %t12 = add i32 0, 1999
  %t13 = call ptr @InputKt_toRoman(i32 %t12)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t13)
  ret i32 0
}
